creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 173855
Patch to version 0.7.5

Hello,
the attached patch updates audio/ncmpcpp to version 0.7.5. This is another small bugfix release. The upstream changelog is:

- Action chains can be now used for seeking.
- Fixed fetching artist info from last.fm.
- Default value of regular_expressions was changed from ‘basic’ to ‘perl’ to work around boost issue (#12222).
- Fixed crash occuring when searching backward in an empty list.

Changes to the port are:

- Add a now required dependency to devel/icu.

This update was build-tested with Poudriere on FreeBSD 9.3, 10.1, 10.2 and 10.3. It was runtime tested for about 24h on 10.3.
